name: H3-30 Test Flight
location_str: Yoshinobu LC-LP-2 @ Tanegashima Space Center, JPN
description: Test flight of the H3-30 variant of the H3 launch vehicle with 3 LE-9 engines in the first stage and no SRBs. The flight will carry a dummy main payload (Vehicle Evaluation Payload 5, VEP-5) and several hitchhiking small satellites:  * PETREL  * STARS-X  * BRO-22  * VERTECS  * HORN-L/R
rocket_fact: Most rockets use a 'Gravity Turn', tilting slightly after liftoff to let gravity do the work of turning the rocket horizontal.
